mapper.select: SELECT comt_no, comt_content, comt_pw, secret_yn, writer_name FROM tb_comment WHERE comt_no = #{comtNo} AND comt_del_yn = 'N'

SELECT comt_no, board_no, comt_content, writer_name, secret_yn, TO_CHAR(comt_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS comt_date FROM tb_comment WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND comt_del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY comt_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comment WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND comt_del_yn = 'N'
